title: OpenDelve Evidence Manifest
description: Manifest for an attached evidence file. Lives at evidence/manifests/<subject>-<schema>-<id>.json. Raw evidence stays at the user-provided path; only the manifest goes in git by default. PHI policy: raw is NEVER embedded in the manifest unless --include-raw is explicitly passed at audit packet build time.

subject.description: Subject id this evidence is attached to (SOP-NNNN, shipment-NNN, etc.).

schema.description: Evidence schema name. Must match a schema declared in an installed pack's evidence-schemas/ directory.

rawPath.description: Path to the raw evidence file at the time of attachment. Relative to repo root if inside the repo, or absolute if outside (PHI-safe path).

rawHash.description: sha256 of the raw evidence file content at the time of attachment. Hex lowercase.

rawMimeType.description: Detected MIME type of the raw file.

schemaValidated.description: Did the raw file pass schema validation at add time?

schemaValidationErrors.description: If schemaValidated is false, the validation failures.

metadata.description: Schema-specific metadata extracted from the evidence at add time. Shape varies by schema.

actor.description: Optional GitHub actor when run inside Actions.
